# van der Waals
#==============

LJ:UNIT SIGMA angstrom
LJ:UNIT EPSILON kcalmol
LJ:SCALE 1 0.0
LJ:SCALE 2 0.0
LJ:SCALE 3 1.0

# ---------------------------------
# KEY      ffatype  SIGMA  EPSILON
# ---------------------------------

LJ:PARS     C_ME  3.431   0.105000
LJ:PARS     H_ME  2.571   0.044000
